---
title: "13_multi_omic_factor_analysis"
format: html
editor: source
---

```{r}
# ---- packages ----
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(limma)
library(EnhancedVolcano)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(ggrepel)
library(vegan)
library(tidyverse)
library(data.table)
library(purrr)
library(haven)
library(ggVennDiagram)
library(caret)
library(jsonlite)
library(mixOmics)
library(circlize)
#BiocManager::install("MOFA2")
library(MOFA2)
#BiocManager::install("GGally")
library(GGally)
#BiocManager::install("psych")
library(psych)
```

```{r}
user <- Sys.info()[["user"]]

if (user == "leidholt") {
  root_path <- "/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/leidholt/"
  git_path  <- "/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/leidholt/CHCO-Code/"
  keys      <- fromJSON("/mmfs1/home/leidholt/keys.json")
} else if (user == "sleidholt") {
  root_path <- "/Users/Shared/OneDrive - UW/Laura Pyle's files - Biostatistics Core Shared Drive/"
  dir.results <- file.path(root_path, "Savanah Leidholt", "TRIAD", "Results")
  git_path <- "/Users/sleidholt/Documents/GitHub/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
  keys <- fromJSON("/Users/Shared/OneDrive - UW/Personal_storage/keys.json")
} else if (user == "savanahleidholt") {
  root_path <- "/Users/savanahleidholt/OneDrive - UW/Laura Pyle's files - Biostatistics Core Shared Drive/"
  dir.results <- file.path(root_path, "Savanah Leidholt", "TRIAD", "Results")
  git_path <- "/Users/savanahleidholt/Desktop/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
  keys <- fromJSON("/Users/savanahleidholt/OneDrive - UW/Personal_storage/keys.json")
} else {
  stop("Unknown user: please specify root path for this user.")
}
```

```{r}
limma_prot <- readRDS(file.path(
  root_path, "Savanah Leidholt", "TRIAD", "Data",
  "limma_gsea_inputs_age_sex_study.rds"
))
prot_out  <- limma_prot$all_omics$out
prot_log <- readRDS(file = file.path(root_path, "Savanah Leidholt", "TRIAD", "Data", "proteomics_paired_matrix.rds"))



limma_metab <- readRDS(file.path(
  root_path, "Savanah Leidholt", "TRIAD", "Data",
  "limma_metabolomics_inputs_age_sex_study.rds"
))
metab_out <- limma_metab$all_omics$out
metab_log <- readRDS(file = file.path(root_path,"Savanah Leidholt","TRIAD","Data","metabolomics_paired_matrix.rds"))



meta_paired<- readRDS(file = file.path(root_path, "Savanah Leidholt", "TRIAD", "Data", "paired_metadata.rds"))
```
#----------------------------
#function for top 50 features
#---------------------------
```{r}
get_top_abs_t <- function(out_list, contrast_name, n = 50) {
  out_list[[contrast_name]] %>%
    dplyr::mutate(abs_t = abs(t)) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(abs_t)) %>%
    dplyr::slice_head(n = n) %>%
    dplyr::pull(feature_id)
}
```

```{r}
contrast_order <- c(
  "T1D_vs_LC",
  "T2D_vs_LC",
  "T1D_vs_T2D",
  "OC_vs_LC",
  "T1D_vs_OC",
  "T2D_vs_OC"
)

top_prot <- purrr::map(
  contrast_order,
  ~ get_top_abs_t(prot_out, .x, n = 50)
) %>%
  unlist() %>%
  unique()

top_metab <- purrr::map(
  contrast_order,
  ~ get_top_abs_t(metab_out, .x, n = 50)
) %>%
  unlist() %>%
  unique()
```

#----------------------------
# subset paired matrices
#----------------------------
```{r}
common_ids <- Reduce(
  intersect,
  list(
    rownames(prot_log),
    rownames(metab_log),
    rownames(meta_paired)
  )
)

prot_mofa <- prot_log[common_ids, top_prot, drop = FALSE]
metab_mofa <- metab_log[common_ids, top_metab, drop = FALSE]
meta_mofa <- meta_paired[common_ids, , drop = FALSE]

prot_mofa <- prot_mofa[, intersect(colnames(prot_mofa), top_prot), drop = FALSE]
metab_mofa <- metab_mofa[, intersect(colnames(metab_mofa), top_metab), drop = FALSE]
meta_mofa2 <- meta_mofa %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("sample") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    sample = as.character(sample),
    group = "group1"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(sample %in% samples_names(MOFAobject)[[1]]) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(match(sample, samples_names(MOFAobject)[[1]]))

samples_metadata(MOFAobject) <- meta_mofa2
```

#------------------------------------------------
# clean matrices
# MOFA wants samples as columns, features as rows
#------------------------------------------------
```{r}
clean_for_mofa <- function(mat) {
  mat <- as.matrix(mat)
  storage.mode(mat) <- "numeric"
  
  # remove all-missing features
  mat <- mat[, colSums(!is.na(mat)) > 0, drop = FALSE]
  
  # remove zero variance features
  keep_var <- apply(mat, 2, function(x) {
    var(x, na.rm = TRUE) > 0
  })
  mat <- mat[, keep_var, drop = FALSE]
  
  # scale features
  mat <- scale(mat)
  
  # transpose: features x samples
  t(mat)
}

prot_mofa_t <- clean_for_mofa(prot_mofa)
#prot_mofa_t
metab_mofa_t <- clean_for_mofa(metab_mofa)
#metab_mofa_t
```
#-----------
#mofa object
#-----------
```{r}
data_mofa <- list(
  proteomics = prot_mofa_t,
  metabolomics = metab_mofa_t
)

MOFAobject <- create_mofa(data_mofa)
samples_names(MOFAobject)

mofa_samples <- samples_names(MOFAobject)$group1

meta_mofa2 <- meta_mofa %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("sample") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    sample = as.character(sample),
    group = "group1"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(sample %in% mofa_samples) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(match(sample, mofa_samples))

stopifnot(identical(meta_mofa2$sample, mofa_samples))

samples_metadata(MOFAobject) <- meta_mofa2
```

```{r}
data_opts <- get_default_data_options(MOFAobject)
model_opts <- get_default_model_options(MOFAobject)
train_opts <- get_default_training_options(MOFAobject)

model_opts$num_factors <- 10

train_opts$convergence_mode <- "medium"
train_opts$seed <- 1835
train_opts$maxiter <- 1000
```

```{r}
MOFAobject <- prepare_mofa(
  object = MOFAobject,
  data_options = data_opts,
  model_options = model_opts,
  training_options = train_opts
)
```

```{r}
mofa_dir <- file.path(
  root_path,
  "Savanah Leidholt",
  "TRIAD",
  "Results",
  "Integrated",
  "MOFA",
  "mofa_prot_metab_top50_abs_t.hdf5"
)

#dir.create(dirname(mofa_dir), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

MOFAmodel <- run_mofa(
  object = MOFAobject,
  outfile = mofa_dir,
  use_basilisk = TRUE
)
```
#-------------
#summary plots
#-------------
```{r}
plot_variance_explained(MOFAmodel)

plot_factors(
  MOFAmodel,
  factors = 1:6,
  color_by = "group4"
)

plot_factor(
  MOFAmodel,
  factor = 1,
  color_by = "group4"
)

plot_weights(
  MOFAmodel,
  view = "proteomics",
  factor = 1,
  nfeatures = 20
)

plot_weights(
  MOFAmodel,
  view = "metabolomics",
  factor = 1,
  nfeatures = 20
)
```

```{r}
correlate_factors_with_covariates(
  MOFAmodel,
  covariates = c("age", "bmi", "hba1c", "eGFR_fas_cr", "acr_u") 
)
```
